summary: Plan mode only. This is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster, and no shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-creation action is planned. Most hydrated PRs are conservatively classified as independent inventory items; #28081 and seven unhydrated late-shard refs need human follow-up because the provided artifacts do not contain live target kind/state/updated_at needed for deterministic classification.
